sourceSummary.oneLine: Part approval package for BLUE_FOOT_RUBBER, part/model number MKK-000108, supplied by 성준테크㈜ to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports customer/supplier approval documentation, revision history, raw material listing, material properties section, QC process flow, and inspection criteria for the part.
keyPoints: Part name is BLUE_FOOT_RUBBER and part number is MKK-000108.
Applicable models listed are G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, G1717FWP.
Supplier is 성준테크㈜ and customer is ㈜H&abyz.
Raw material listed is SH0170U for product internal use, maker KCC실리콘, with ND shown for Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE non-use certificate field.
QC process/control plan identifies mass production and DVS category.
